channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: What Defines a Great Children's Treasury
Secret Service Fatally Shoots Man Who Fired Gun Near White House Saturday Evening
item.description: A man who fired shots near the White House on Saturday was killed after Secret Service agents returned fire.

item.title: Next Generation of Conservative Leaders Urged to Embrace Civility
item.description: In his upcoming book, the former vice president argues that public figures must practice the art of compromise.

item.title: The Overlooked Theology in the Declaration of Independence
item.description: Contrary to modern views, the Founders saw freedom and morality as deeply connected.
